feed.title: 智域前沿 · 全球科技与安全态势日报
feed.subtitle: 本期从 16 个公开信源筛选出 10 条重点事件，覆盖科技、AI、航空航天、安全动态与无人系统。

entry.title: Daytime Russian strike kills three in Zaporizhzhia
entry.summary: A Russian guided aerial bomb attack on Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine, killed at least three people and injured 13 others. 关键事实：A Russian guided aerial bomb attack on Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine, killed at least three people and injured 13 others.

entry.title: Could This New Northrop Spacecraft Use Its Robotic Arms To Attack Enemy Satellites?
entry.summary: The Mission Robotic Vehicle's job is maintaining and refueling satellites in orbit, but it also opens the door to a different kind of 'armed' capability. 关键事实：The Mission Robotic Vehicle's job is maintaining and refueling satellites in orbit, but it also opens the door to a different kind of 'armed' capability.

entry.title: Iran holds funerals for children killed in Minab school strike
entry.summary: Iran has held funerals for 32 children killed in a US strike on a school in Minab, Iran on February 28. 关键事实：Iran has held funerals for 32 children killed in a US strike on a school in Minab, Iran on February 28.

entry.title: Israeli strikes in Gaza kill 12, including family of six, medics say
entry.summary: Firas al-Masri, his wife and their four children died in one attack, which the Israeli military says targeted a Hamas operative. 关键事实：Firas al-Masri, his wife and their four children died in one attack, which the Israeli military says targeted a Hamas operative.

entry.title: Destinus unveils new counter-rocket interceptor
entry.summary: The company is eyeing 2028 to launch mass production of the system, which is envisioned to protect critical military infrastructure such as command posts, air-defense radars and b… 关键事实：The company is eyeing 2028 to launch mass production of the system, which is envisioned to protect critical military infrastructure such as command posts, air-defense radars and b…

entry.title: Embraer, Anduril pursuing Barracuda missiles on C-390
entry.summary: Embraer and Anduril signed an MOU on the Barracuda missile, though no timeline for a first test was available. 关键事实：Embraer and Anduril signed an MOU on the Barracuda missile, though no timeline for a first test was available.

entry.title: NASA to Host Media Briefing on Roman Telescope, Launching Next Month
entry.summary: Media are invited to join NASA for a virtual news conference at 2 p.m. EDT, Wednesday, July 29, to preview the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope mission, scheduled to launch from… 关键事实：Media are invited to join NASA for a virtual news conference at 2 p.m. EDT, Wednesday, July 29, to preview the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope mission, scheduled to launch from…

entry.title: Pentagon identifies soldier killed in controlled detonation of Iranian drone
entry.summary: Sgt. Michael Emmanuel Swinton, 30, was killed Saturday during the controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian one-way attack drone. 关键事实：Sgt. Michael Emmanuel Swinton, 30, was killed Saturday during the controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian one-way attack drone.

entry.title: MV250 Hybrid-Electric VTOL Combat Cargo Drone Unveiled
entry.summary: The new uncrewed platform is designed to move cargo, deploy air-launched effects, and support dispersed military operations. 关键事实：The new uncrewed platform is designed to move cargo, deploy air-launched effects, and support dispersed military operations.

entry.title: US Marine Corps turns to AI-powered Bullfrog as drone threats expand
entry.summary: Allen Control Systems announced Monday that the Marine Corps has chosen the Bullfrog autonomous weapon system to integrate into its airborne defenses. 关键事实：Allen Control Systems announced Monday that the Marine Corps has chosen the Bullfrog autonomous weapon system to integrate into its airborne defenses.
